enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Gaana Gaana conveys a sense of joy and celebration, reflecting the carefree spirit of the characters in 10 Endrathukulla.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

The song is featured during a lively sequence in 10 Endrathukulla, emphasizing the fun and adventurous moments of the protagonists.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Anand Aravindakshan and Shreya Goshal, both of whom bring their unique styles to the track.

Who wrote the lyrics for Gaana Gaana?

The lyrics were penned by Karky, known for his engaging and catchy songwriting.

When was the song released?

Gaana Gaana was released on October 20, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Gaana Gaana, the lively duet by Anand Aravindakshan and Shreya Goshal, the characters celebrate life with infectious energy. The song captures the essence of joy and festivity, perfectly aligning with the adventurous spirit of 10 Endrathukulla. Its upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, making it a favorite for celebrations. This track is a vibrant addition to any party playlist, encouraging listeners to dance and enjoy the moment.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Gaana Gaana from 10 Endrathukulla is a vibrant celebration of life and energy, featuring the dynamic voices of Anand Aravindakshan and Shreya Goshal. This upbeat track perfectly captures the essence of joy and festivity, making it a must-listen for any party playlist. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, it's sure to get everyone on their feet!
